name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry Marietta, Georgia — Value Pawn & Jewelry in Miami, FL offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold buying, and discounted pre-owned mer...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, FL operates as part of the EZPAWN family of stores — a national pawn shop chain with standardized systems and branded programs. The store serves Miami's northwest neighborhoods with extended weekday hours and Sunday availability, positioning itself as a community-oriented resource for quick cash and affordable secondhand goods. Its affiliation with EZPAWN gives it infrastructure that independent pawn shops typically lack, including digital account management and a national online inventory platform.

The store's primary financial product is the collateral-based pawn loan: customers bring in items of value, receive cash on the spot, and may reclaim their property by repaying the loan plus applicable fees within the loan term. Beyond lending, the store buys gold and diamond jewelry outright — including broken gold of any karat — using in-store testing to determine metal purity and weight. For buyers, the store carries thousands of pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, and fashion items priced 25–70% below new retail. This Miami location also offers two special categories not available at all EZPAWN branches: firearms sales and auto loans.

Several features distinguish this location from a typical independent pawn shop. The EZ+ Rewards program lets customers earn points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions, and manage pawns and layaways through an online account. An Instant Quote tool allows customers to get an estimated value for electronics before visiting the store. A Jewelry VIP Program provides enrolled members with guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, freestone replacement, and a 100% trade-up credit on future jewelry purchases. For purchases, layaway requires just 10% down with monthly installments, and a third-party 'Take Today' option offers take-home financing subject to credit eligibility, in some cases for up to 12 months.

For consumers who need fast cash without a credit check, this store offers a legitimate and regulated option backed by chain-level infrastructure. However, the website discloses no APR, fee schedules, or loan term details — stating only that pawn transactions are 'subject to terms and conditions, including fees.' Florida pawn shop fees can be significant relative to loan value, and the 'Take Today' financing involves unspecified third-party lenders with undisclosed rates. This is a practical option for those who own pawnable assets and need liquidity quickly, but not a cost-competitive alternative to credit union loans or personal lending for those who qualify.
pros: EZ+ Rewards program earns points on pawns, sales, and purchases with online account management
Instant Quote tool estimates electronics value online before visiting the store
In-store gold and metal testing ensures accurate pricing for sellers
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down payment required
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new inventory
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, and freestone replacement
This Miami location carries firearms and auto loans — special categories not at all EZPAWN branches
cons: No APR, fee rates, or loan term details disclosed on the website — cost of borrowing is opaque
'Take Today' financing depends on third-party lenders and credit eligibility with no disclosed rates
Not all services are available in all areas — some programs have state-level restrictions
Product Protection Plans and Jewelry VIP Program are add-on costs on top of purchase price
Pawn loans are short-term and fee-based — typically more expensive than credit union or personal loan alternatives
best_for: People who own electronics, jewelry, or tools and need immediate cash without a credit check
Budget shoppers looking for discounted brand-name electronics, jewelry, and fashion
Gold and diamond jewelry sellers seeking an in-store expert appraisal and immediate payment
Shoppers who cannot access traditional credit and need layaway or flexible take-home financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami residents who own pawnable assets and need same-day cash without a credit application, or bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned brand-name goods. The main caveat is that pawn loan fees are not disclosed online and can be costly relative to other credit products — consumers who qualify for a personal loan or credit union PAL should compare costs before pawning.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying (any karat, broken gold accepted)
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, gaming, musical gear)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Take Today third-party flexible financing (up to 12 months, credit-dependent)
EZ+ Rewards program with online pawn and layaway account management
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, freestone replacement)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Firearms sales (special category at this location)
Auto loans (special category at this location)
